why_flagged: Pooled RoBERTa fine-tune; OOF fold predictions were picked by best val_AUROC across 3 epochs (test-set model selection).
Pooled DeBERTa-v3-base fine-tune; OOF fold predictions were picked by best val_AUROC across 3 epochs.
Pooled Step Transformer; OOF fold predictions picked by best val_AUROC per epoch.
Pooled TraceGIN-structural; OOF picked by best val_AUROC + early stop. Double leak.
Pooled TraceGIN-hybrid; OOF picked by best val_AUROC AND early-stopped when val_AUROC plateaued. Double leak.
Fold-local info-gain mining + LR. No epoch concept, no test-set peeking. Leakage-safe by construction.
